mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report a forklift accident in Utah before it's too late to file a claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah, you should report the injury within 30 days and file a formal claim within one year. Idaho allows 60 days for notice, but reporting immediately is always safer to prevent insurance disputes.
